latest.title: Dolphins Delfines se llaman por silbidos únicos
latest.script_key: los delfines se llaman con silbidos nicos observa c mo se separan usan el sonido para no perder a nadie en mar abierto cada silbido es como un nombre propio que ayuda al grupo a reencontrarse cuando el agua est turbia vida social marina es ruidosa qu sonido desciframos ahora now the dolphin name at the start makes sense

latest.title: Mountains aren't as static as they look
latest.script_key: mountains don t stand still glaciers carve them down that fast see those jagged layers they used to be smooth that s why every year ice grinds away a meter of rock here notice how the cliff faces look freshly scraped that s the glacier s work what shape would your hometown be in after 10 000 years of this

latest.title: Glaciers carve valleys faster than rivers
latest.script_key: ice does the heavy lifting those smooth u shaped valleys glaciers carved them not rivers that s why the cliffs look so steep the ice scraped rock like a giant cheese grater notice how the layers tilt that s the glacier s work too ever stood on a real glacier hands feel like they re on a freezer shelf

latest.title: desert dunes hide a food web most people miss
latest.script_key: desert dunes aren t empty every shift reveals tracks that tie the whole ecosystem together that fox didn t just dig for snacks that s how seeds get planted that beetle isn t just wandering it s fertilizing the next meal you see the next storm s future in these footprints

latest.title: Magnets make invisible fields visible
latest.script_key: magnets can show a hidden force map watch the filings line up because each tiny piece becomes a small magnet in the field together they trace the direction of the force around the magnet the pattern is physics drawing itself which force next

latest.title: Fish in a tank aren't just swimming randomly
latest.script_key: this fish isn t just swimming watch its fins it s steering with its tail like a rudder but that s not all it s using its pectoral fins to feel the water s currents that s why it swims so smoothly most people think fish just flap and go but this one s actually reading the room
